live_pre_intake_audit.note: This provisional live audit rechecked the remaining ready pool by source_set_id + source_external_id and same-set-hint base-name presence. It is sufficient to prove the 250-row batch cannot be materialized, but it is not a replacement for a future bounded base-repair pass.

secondary_findings.summary: Even the residual 48-row ready pool is not uniformly clean under live precheck; likely follow-up base/routing audit remains before any further widening.
